title: AllTheFakemon
description: AllTheFakemon is a combined datapack collaboration featuring Fakemon from many popular packs. Enjoy a massive collection of Fakemon in one place!
body:
Make sure to add the starters.json and main.json in the starter screen into your cobblemon config! (Run The Game First)

How To Do It: Take the AllTheFakemon.zip and it into your resourcepacks and datapacks.0

Huge Thanks To All Creators. I do not take credit for any of it and the creators did all of it.

Credits
Doctor X: Alatia Fakemon
FumpleWumper: ScrappedMons + Helped Set up
zac-lyor: Cobbled Variants
FossilFace: Physcie's Creature Of Emotion
Wi2tert: CobbleDian
Captain Nautilis: Lively Mons
BifeSalgado: Fossil Hybrids
Lasercraft32: Laser Fakemon
Duskgusting: GG&T Fakemon



I explicitly have gotten permission from all of these creators. It is in the datapacks zip folder in the proof.

Featuring The Following Packs:

Alatia Fakemon
Cobbled Variants
Scrapped Mons
Extra Eeveelutions
Physcie's Creatures Of Emotion
CobbleDian
Lively Mons
Fossil Hybrids
Laser Fakemon
GG&T Fakemon


Ride On Support {Coming}
